scripts.clean: npx rimraf node_modules/chess-core node_modules/chess-server && npm i
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.web: npm run build && cd apps/chess-mobile && npm run web
scripts.mobile: npm run build && cd apps/chess-mobile && npm run android
scripts.server: npm run build && cd apps/chess-server && npm run dev
scripts.export-mobile: npm run build && cd apps/chess-mobile/android && gradlew assembleRelease
